---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work the way you expect
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A short description.
What did you do, what did you expect, what happened instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

If you can attach a minimal workspace that reproduces the bug, even better.
Drop a `.zip` or paste relevant `.md` + sidecar JSON contents.

## Expected

What you thought would happen.

## Actual

What did happen.
Include the *exact* error message if there was one (or a screenshot of the TUI state if visual).

## Environment

- outl version: `outl --version`
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows + version
- Terminal: iTerm2 / Alacritty / Windows Terminal / ...
- Theme: default-dark / dracula / ...

## Anything else

Stack traces, related issues, hunches.
